title: Palo Alto Networks warns of firewall RCE zero-day exploited in attacks
description: Palo Alto Networks warned customers today that a critical-severity unpatched vulnerability in the PAN-OS User-ID Authentication Portal is being exploited in attacks.

title: 10 trillion downloads are crushing open-source repositories - here's what they're doing about it | ZDNET
description: Companies are treating these repositories like content delivery networks - now the Linux Foundation and colleagues are saying enough is enough. Here's the plan.
